meaning: adj.涓嶈兘涓嬪畾涔夌殑,涓嶇‘瀹氱殑
examples: There was something indefinable in her eyes.
She has that indefinable something that makes an actress a star.
Some mysterious, indefinable characteristic sets him apart from all other men.
Lawyers foresee years of intense argument, appeals and counter-appeals, accompanied by fat fees, stretching into the indefinable future.
